mapper.sql: provider_id, provider_code, provider_name, api_base_url, api_key, enabled, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM clinic_ai_provider WHERE provider_code = #{providerCode} LIMIT 1

SELECT FROM clinic_ai_provider WHERE 1 = 1
AND provider_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{providerCode}, '%')
AND provider_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{providerName}, '%')
AND enabled = #{enabled}
ORDER BY provider_id DESC
SELECT FROM clinic_ai_provider WHERE enabled = 1 ORDER BY provider_name ASC, provider_id ASC
